name: Old-Fashioned Strawberry Shortcake
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare buttermilk biscuit dough using the specified ingredients.
2. Cut strawberries into slices and mix with sugar and lemon juice.
3. Chill the mixture for about an hour to allow flavors to meld.
4. Bake the biscuit dough according to your recipe instructions.
5. Serve the cooled biscuits layered with the strawberry compote, topped with whipped cream, and dusted with powdered sugar. Turn off heat sources before serving.
